title: 17 structures destroyed by fire, donations needed
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George municipality is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George municipality is asking the public for donations of clothing, shoes and household items after 17 informal structures were razed to the ground in Thembalethu earlier this morning, Sunday 23 June.

Donated items can be delivered from tomorrow (Monday) to the George municipal social development offices on the corner of Varing Street and St John's Road between 07:45 and 16:30.For any queries in this regard please contact Sophie Fanelo, the social development manager on 044 802 2000.MMC for Electrical Engineering Donovan Gultig on the scene this morning. Photo: Supplied

George Mayor Jackie Von Brandis with Cllr Khayalethu Lose and Cllr Thembinkosi Lento, as well as other municipal members, on the scene in Thembalethu this morning. Photo: Supplied

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
